title: Hegseth says 'the ceasefire is not over' — Caine: Iran attacked US 10+ times since April 8, all 'below threshold'
snippet: Pentagon chief Pete Hegseth: 'The ceasefire is not over.' Joint Chiefs Chairman Dan Caine: since April 8 ceasefire, Iran has fired at commercial vessels 9 times, seized 2 container ships, and attacked US forces more than 10 times — 'all below the threshold of restarting major combat operations.' US Navy has destroyed 7 Iranian fast boats in total. Project Freedom involves 15,000 US service members. Hegseth: operation is 'defensive in nature, focused in scope, and temporary in duration.' Rubio: Iran should 'pay a price.' 13 American personnel killed and 402 wounded since war began.
tag_reason: 5/5 펜타곤 브리핑은 휴전 이후 최초의 공식 정량적 위반 통계와 임계값 개념을 공개한 신규 정보

entities.name: Dan Caine
entities.role: Chairman of Joint Chiefs of Staff
